description: Legal document classification — contracts, court filings, correspondence, and evidence

categories.name: contract
categories.description: Signed or unsigned agreement between two or more parties

categories.name: court_filing
categories.description: Document filed with a court — pleadings, motions, judgments, orders

categories.name: correspondence
categories.description: Formal letters, legal notices, demand letters, solicitor communications

categories.name: invoice_bill
categories.description: Invoice, bill, or statement of account relevant to a dispute or claim

categories.name: evidence_photo
categories.description: Photograph submitted as evidence — damage, scene, injury

categories.name: identification
categories.description: Identity documents — passport, driving licence, national ID

categories.name: financial_record
categories.description: Bank statements, payslips, tax returns, financial evidence

categories.name: witness_statement
categories.description: Signed written statement from a witness

categories.name: expert_report
categories.description: Report from a professional expert — surveyor, doctor, accountant

categories.name: screenshot_digital
categories.description: Screenshot of a digital communication — email, chat, social media, website
